message:
fix(tests): eliminate 74 compiler warnings across 14 test files

Suppress dead_code warnings in shared test utility modules (fixtures.rs,
lab.rs) that caused 39x duplicate warnings across every test binary.
Also fix unused imports, unused mut, and useless comparison warnings in
individual test files.

Warning count: ~74 unique (thousands with duplication) → 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
